structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-06-03 New Investor; Capital Alliance
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-06-03 12:59:43-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Capital Markets is excited to launch a new brokered partner, Capital Alliance!  Capital Alliance prides themselves on getting deals done through their in-house underwriting flexibility and creative guideline structure.  With a variety of product offerings, they will serve as a great non-QM outlet for your borrowers with uncommon scenarios.  They are licensed in the states of AZ, CA, WA, OR, ID, UT, and TX.  Please see below for product highlights and pricing color with marketing materials and matrices attached.

 

Product Highlights: 

*	Non-QM Loan Solutions

	*	Primary or Second Home

		*	Loan amounts up to $4M
		*	90% LTV
		*	FICO as low as 620
		*	Traditional or Alt Docs allowed

	*	Investment

		*	Loan amounts up to $3M
		*	NOO SFR, Condo, or 2-4 Units
		*	Purchase, Refinance, or Cash-Out Options 
		*	Eligible for LLCs, S Corps, Trusts, or Individuals

*	Foreign National

	*	Loan amounts up to $1.5M
	*	75% LTV
	*	SSN and US credit history not required
	*	Cash-Out refinancing available

*	Bridge Loan

	*	Loan amounts up to $1M
	*	70% LTV
	*	FICO as low as 600
	*	IO terms up to 24 months

*	Fix & Flip

	*	Loan amounts up to $1M
	*	80% Loan-to-Cost
	*	IO terms up to 24 months
	*	Fix & Flip experience required

Pricing Color – 2.5% Borrower Paid Compensation not included in rate

 

Scenario

	1 Yr Bank Statement

	Rate

	7.000

Important Notes: 

	*	Please refer to the following landing page for Capital Alliance, guidelines and marketing flyers. 

		*	 Capital Alliance <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EqS_VWcNrxdBg_sZp9Xke-MBOu4xYn6cVy3qwfyrcMIDWw?e=SqL0dv>

For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  

For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 

For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
